publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-04-29 18:35:03 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, Memorabilia, Movie Film, Newspapers, Photographs, Printed Materials.
did.abstract: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Cornell University Class of 1947, Columbia University Ph.D. 1955.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers of Dr. Joyce Brothers include correspondence, subject files, letters received, scripts, clippings, contracts, awards, photographs, cartoons, slides, and articles and books by Dr. Brothers. Audiovisual Archives of Dr. Joyce Brothers include 463 motion picture films, ca. 796 video tapes, and 184 audio recordings.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Dr. Joyce Brothers papers, #4254. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Consult Dr. Brothers changed titles and is also referred to as "The Dr. Joyce Brothers Show" or "The Dr. Joyce Brothers Program" in the early years. It is unclear when exactly the name changed, but was clearly Consult Dr. Brothers in 1961. Documents that were not labelled with the show title were labelled as "Consult Dr. Brothers" for consistency. The show was picked up by NBC and later ABC (1961). It ran from 1959 to circa 1961 and preceded "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers". 65 episodes. In 1961, letters say "ready to shoot" 1-28, so maybe Dr. JB Show was pre-61, and Consult started with ABC in 1961? but referred to in publicity pamphlets in 1962 as "The Dr. Joyce Brothers show"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These notes likely relate to Consult Dr. Brothers, as they were found with related material, but may also contain information on "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers." Included are notes for redaction and censorship for the show from WEWS.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These notes likely relate to Consult Dr. Brothers, as they were found with related material, but may also contain information on "Tell Me, Dr. Brothers."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes publicity and publicity booklet from ABC Films.

did.unittitle: Meet Dr. Brothers publicity for "Dr. Joyce Brothers," WRCA-TV

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: These are likely from Consult Dr. Brothers, in a folder labelled "Toronto A's"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Issues at the 20:30 mark. Static across screen, warped audio for the promo. Promos and segments. Topics: live with active husband; nudity; bored baby; job satisfaction.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Duplicate of V-12617.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Promos and segments. Topics: wife resents first wife; shopping mania; contented wives; square mother child rates.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Duplicate of the promos on V-12617, for channels 2-12, and general promo, filmed on March 25 ,1961. Followed by 30 minutes of blank tape, then 10 second promos for channels 2-12, and general promo. These promos were filmed on March 24, 1961.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes commercials. Topics: my second wife resents things I did with my first wife; husband critical of wife's shopping.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Topics include: Is abortion the way out of a dilemma?; when is it right for a young girl to kiss a boy?; second marriages; 4-year-old interested in sex.

scopecontent.p: Folders may contain press releases.

did.unittitle: Subseries q. Books and publications by others
Stern, Jane and Michael. "Encyclopedia of Pop Culture"
Decker, Jonathan P. "Great Dad's: a Celebration of Fatherhood"
Kreskin. "The Amazing Kreskin's Future With the Stars"
Sager, Christian B. and Evans, Peter. "Treasure Your Teeth"
Lynn-Barnes, Diana. "Celebrity Parenting: Famous Parents Share Personal Stories"
Astor, Bart. "Baby Boomer's Guide to Caring for Aging Parents"
Liberman, Jill, compiler. "American Pride: Famous Americans Celebrate the USA"
McCuen, Jo Ray and Winkler, Anthony C. "From Idea to Essay: a Rhetoric, Reader, and Handbook"
Brown, James I. and Fishco, Vivian V. "Reading Power"
Levine, Michael. "Lessons at the Halfway Point: Wisdom for Midlife"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains numbered articles and segments, arranged by Brothers. She referred to them "Shorties."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Card files of publications as well as a guide to the numbered shorties (several boxes are organized by subject, with corresponding shortie number)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Card files of publications as well as a guide to the numbered shorties (several boxes are organized by subject, with corresponding shortie number)

did.unittitle: Subseries a. Letters from the public

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This subseries contains letters from viewers, listeners, readers, and fans. The bulk of this correspondence is advice letters. For related correspondence, see individual series for Brothers' shows and publications.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains general correspondence from viewers/listeners, as well as hate mail and anti-semitic letters.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence regarding appearances, schedules, collaborations, requests, and day to day business.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes correspondence with Hugh Hefner.

did.unittitle: Thank you letters for speaking engagements/lectures/television appearances

did.unittitle: Condolence letters after death of Milton Brothers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Proposed program where Dr. Brothers dramatic presentation of cases based on actual letter. This show was 20-25 minutes. Brothers was represented by Lester Lewis Associates. This is a different show than Consult Dr. Brothers/The Dr. Joyce Brothers show. It may not have been filmed or aired.

did.unittitle: Contract for "Dr. Joyce Brothers Casebook" writers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Folder contains an unsigned contract between writer Stephen Gethers and Brothers (Lester Lewis Associates). Signed contracts with Adrian Spies, Steven Gethers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Payment and employment documentation for script writers, costs for program

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Notes, budgets, correspondence, script on frigidity and other untitled scripts, notes, and an employee handbook.

did.unittitle: "Sibling Rivalry" by Adele and Irve Tunick script
